lint.command: N/A — no lint command configured in services.yaml

nonBlockingIssues.description: JSDoc comment in db.ts says 'existing row returned without modification' but ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET does re-set columns to defaults. Idempotent for current usage but misleading.
Minor test redundancy: 'should NOT use ignoreDuplicates' and 'should use ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE SET' tests overlap significantly.
resolveSession() called before the action (cancel/done/edit). If DB operation throws, session is already resolved and user cannot retry. Consistent with existing codebase patterns.
Fuzzy match bidirectional check could match very short task names ('a', 'go') against any reply. Unlikely edge case given expected naming patterns.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add convention: All user-facing time formatting must pass the user's timezone to toLocaleTimeString/toLocaleDateString (e.g., `{ timeZone: userTimezone }`). Never rely on machine-local time.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Features status-lifecycle-scheduler, edit-cancel-flows, and eod-summary all originally formatted times without timezone. fix-timezone-formatting corrected all 5 call sites. This was flagged by 3 reviewers in round 1 and now fixed, but the convention should be documented to prevent regression.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note: The 'backend-worker' skill referenced in features.json does not exist. All backend features' workers fell back to mission-worker-base. Either create the skill or update features.json to reference an existing skill.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All round-1 and round-2 review reports note the missing backend-worker skill. Worker transcripts show 'Error: Skill backend-worker not found' across all features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that any disambiguation prompt in the dispatcher must create a conversation session (awaiting_edit_target state with candidate_todo_ids). This pattern is now consistently implemented across all 4 disambiguation entry points (done, cancel, cancel-named, edit-time) but is not documented as a convention.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-disambiguation-followup had to add session creation to the DONE_RE multi-task path which was missing it. The pattern should be explicit so future dispatcher changes maintain it.

rejectedObservations.observation: supabase-upsert-gotchas.md already exists covering the exact issue fixed
getOrCreateUser() docstring in db.ts is misleading about 'without modification'
rejectedObservations.reason: Minor code comment accuracy issue — not a shared-state concern. Better addressed as a code-level fix, not guidance.

rejectedObservations.observation: backend-worker skill doesn't exist (raised by fix-disambiguation-followup review)
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate — already raised in round 1 and included in suggestedGuidanceUpdates

rejectedObservations.observation: Supabase mock pattern not documented (from round 1)
